steps: "Contact RBC Investor Services to request refund of CAD 4,077.00 overpayment on BMO dividend for account 1401234567",
"Provide documentation showing CA-NO treaty rate of 15% applies, resulting in correct withholding of CAD 40,770.00 vs actual CAD 36,693.00",
"Reference CRA Part XIII tax rates confirming 15% treaty rate for Norwegian residents on Canadian dividends",
"If RBC disputes, escalate with Norwegian tax residency certificate and treaty article citations"

references.title: CRA – Rates for Part XIII Tax (WHT rates & treaty reduction)
